meta.title: Tutorio
meta.description: Financial calendar for private tutors and small schools

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back! Sign in to your workspace.

register.title: Create your workspace
register.subtitle: Start managing lessons, students and payments.
register.name: Your name
register.workspaceNameHint: For example, the name of your school or studio
register.passwordHint: At least 12 characters — a long passphrase works best

errors.EMAIL_TAKEN: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
errors.INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN: Your session is no longer valid. Please sign in again.
errors.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters
validation.passwordTooLong: Password must be at most 128 characters
validation.nameTooLong: Name must be at most 120 characters
validation.workspaceNameTooShort: Workspace name must be at least 2 characters
validation.workspaceNameTooLong: Workspace name must be at most 80 characters

dashboard.emptyDescription: Students, groups, calendar and finance will appear here in the next stages. For now, explore the navigation and account settings.
